titleStmt.title: SII 30.144: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 144. (A.R. No. 223 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District. Chandramauḷīśvarā temple-on the south wall Pārthivēndravarmaṉ: year 2: 961 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription registers a gift of fifteen kaḻañju of gold for a perpetual lamp to the temple of śrī Pōndaip-perumāṉaḍigaḷ by Iṉnāṅgūr alias Alaṅkāra cheṭṭi, son of Maṅgalapriyaṉ Kalivilaṅki, a merchant of Tiruvēgambachcheri in Rājamallachchaturvēdimaṅgalam. The gaṇapperumakkaḷ undertook the responsibility of maintaining the lamp with the interest.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . vīrapāṇṭiyaṉait
talaikoṇṭa kom(ā)hārājaṟku yāṇṭu 2 Āvatu rājamallaccaturvveti maṅkalattu
tiruvekampacceri vyāpāri maṅkalapriyaṉ kalivilaṅki makaṉ Iṉnāṅkūr Ākiya Ala
ṅkāra ceṭṭi pontaip perumāṉaṭikaḷukku Oru nuntā viḷakkukku vaitta poṉ pati
ṉaiṅ kaḻañcu Ippoṉ patiṉaiṅkaḻañcālum vanta vṛddhip poṉ koṇṭu śrīko
yil kaṇapperumakkaḷe cantrātityavarai Erippitāka vaiytteṉ Alaṅkāra ceṭṭi
yeṉ Iddharmmam rakṣippār śrīpātam Eṉṟalai melaṉa Aṟamaṟaveṟka Aṟamallatu tu
ṇaiyillai .
Digital edition of SII 30.144 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
